description_long: This object is a sleek, modern jet airplane with a streamlined fuselage and sharply swept-back wings. The aircraft features a twin-engine configuration with jet exhausts located at the rear, and a pointed nose cone for aerodynamic efficiency. The cockpit is enclosed with a clear canopy and appears to be designed for two occupants in tandem seating. The wings are mid-mounted with a slight dihedral angle and display blue lightning bolt graphics along the sides. The tail section includes a single vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers in a conventional arrangement. The landing gear is tricycle-type, with two main wheels under the wings and a single nose wheel.
description: A modern, twin-engine jet airplane with swept-back mid-mounted wings, a tandem cockpit, and tricycle landing gear. It features a streamlined fuselage, blue lightning graphics, and a conventional tail.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pointed nose, tandem cockpit canopy, and symmetrical swept-back wings with visible landing gear.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the blue lightning bolt graphic, cockpit canopy, and the tricycle landing gear with the nose wheel extended.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the twin jet exhausts, horizontal stabilizers, and the single vertical stabilizer.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the cockpit, blue lightning bolt graphic, and the full length of the fuselage and tail.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Mid-wing configuration with sharply swept-back wings and a slight dihedral angle; no visible winglets.
attribute_engine_type: Twin jet engines mounted at the rear fuselage.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Tricycle landing gear with two main wheels and a single nose wheel, all fixed and extended.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed tandem cockpit with a clear canopy, designed for two seats.
